name: Root, Inc.
summary: PART I . Overview Root is a technology insurance company founded on the idea that car insurance rates should be based primarily on driving behaviors, not demographics. We are revolutionizing the archaic car insurance industry by using modern technology, data science, and telematics to offer fair, personalized rates to good drivers. We primarily reach customers through two channels: our direct channel, where we target consumers with what we believe to be a great insurance product at a great price...
